title: Alterszentrum Kloster Ingenbohl File-Level Provenance Inventory
purpose: Inventory local Ingenbohl media/model files with hashes, slots and blocking review requirements. This does not grant public-use permission.

policy.rule: Filename, folder name or project identity are not rights clearance. Public promotion requires file-level source URL, generation/build evidence, author/creator, license evidence, attribution decision and human review.

review_requirements: human-review model generation/build log and diagrammatic model status
record owner decision on source basis for geometry and material assumptions
confirm whether source plans, drawings or photographs were used
confirm whether geometry is own/generated study geometry
human review before public model preview or download

next_actions: Review the discovered intake build artifacts for the Ingenbohl GLB.
Connect the model to source package evidence only as study geometry until source basis is reviewed.
Keep the model blocked in public provenance until review requirements are satisfied.
